title: Can Collagen Actually Support Bone Density After 40? What Studies Show
seo_title: Can Collagen Support Bone Density After 40? What Research Says
meta_description: Collagen makes up 90% of bone matrix. Research shows specific collagen peptides can support bone density in women after 40. Here is what the evidence says.
tags: Bone Health, Collagen, Osteoporosis, Anti-Aging, Supplements, Women Over 40
